candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Only a component of current assets, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred over component cash lines.
Alternative cash line, but appears to be a component/older-format line and is less preferred than the full standard label.
Component of cash, not necessarily total cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash total rather than cash flow beginning/end balances.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Only one component of current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean total for short-term/current debt; excludes lease wording and appears to capture financing-related current debt.
Also a valid current-maturities debt line, but likely overlaps with Current debt and is therefore less preferred to avoid double counting.
Looks like a component rather than the total.
Semantically valid for STD, but values are blank in preview and a cleaner total exists.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current debt total. Excluded lease liabilities per instruction and avoided combining with 'Borrowings Due within 1 Year' to prevent overlap/double counting.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liability.
Best available balance-sheet line for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets.
PPE-related but only a component and not a total.

variables.notes: Under IFRS, 'Tangible assets' is the closest reported total PPE-type line available.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities
candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist because no OANCF candidates were provided, but this is the explicit operating cash flow total.
